case_title: GERD KONSTAD VS. WILL E. LINDAHL

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. [HEARING: FEB-03-2023 AT 1:30PM]

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONSTAD, GERD ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER CASE CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) TO ALLOW TIME FOR PLAINTIFF TO FORMALIZE LEGAL AUTHORITY OF REPRESENTATION.
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) [HEARING: FEB-03-2023 AT 1:30PM] FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONSTAD, GERD

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO ALLOW TIME FOR PLAINTIFF GERD KONSTAD TO FORMALIZE LEGAL AUTHORITY OF REPRESENTATION TO MAR-08-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GERD KONSTAD IS NOT PRESENT, ORALLY STATED BY SADDEK HADDEDOU (HOMECARE PROVIDER OF GERD KONSTAD) VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM TO REPRESENT FOR GERD KONSTAD (VIDEO DOES NOT WORK). DEFENDANT WILL E. LINDAHL IS PRESENT (VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM). COURT DID NOT RECEIVE DOCUMENT OF SADDEK HADDEDOU BEING LEGAL AUTHORIZED REPRESENTATION FOR PLAINTIFF GERD KONSTAD IN THIS CASE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT WILL E. LINDAHL IS 8 DAYS UNTIMELY, DEFENDANT WILL E. LINDAHL WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT NEED TO RE-DO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT WILL E. LINDAHL. DEFENDANT WILL E. LINDAHL MUST SUBMIT TIMELY AND PROPER ZOOM REQUEST IF TO APPEAR BY ZOOM AT THE NEXT COURT DATE. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY ALL PARTIES. ALL PARTIES MUST APPEAR TO BE HEARD. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY DEFENDANT LINDAHL, WILL E.
SC-109 (AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) SADDEK HADDADOW FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONSTAD, GERD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-08-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-08-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF GERD KONSTAD IS NOT PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SADDEK HADDEDOU (HOMECARE PROVIDER OF GERD KONSTAD WITH POWER OF ATTORNEY) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILL E. LINDAHL IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF KONSTAD, GERD [EXHIBITS RETURNED TO S. HADDEDOU ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF - AUTHORIZATION ON FILE]

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$32.50);PROOF OF SERVICE STAMPED: FILED BY FAX (FORWARDED TO DEPT 506) SERVED JAN-12-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LINDAHL, WILL E.
PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBIT RECEIVED AT WINDOW FOR ZOOM APPEARANCE
DOCUMENT REQUESTED BY COURT RECEIVED [BUT NOT FILED] FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 - ONE DOCUMENT FOR TWO (2) FILES <866375 & 866376> FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONSTAD, GERD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-08-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,778.00 FILED BY KONSTAD, GERD AS TO DEFENDANT LINDAHL, WILL E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) [HEARING: FEB-03-2023 AT 1:30PM] (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KONSTAD, GERD

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KONSTAD, GERD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LINDAHL, WILL E. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE MAR-20-2023 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAIL TO DEFENDANT(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
